content:
# Session 70 (iter-070) — DUAL flank Cone B, SOLO fine-grained lane

## Metadata
- File edited (only): `…/DualInverse/PresheafDualPullback.lean`. Build EXIT 0 (8324 jobs), axiom-clean.
- Sorry count (this file): **3 → 3**. No sorry CLOSED, but **(a) `presheafDualH1Cocycle` added sorry-free** + 3 generic axiom-clean infra lemmas. The 3 remaining sorries: c.2 L720, plus 2 off-path abandoned (L377 L1, L434 L3a) — untouched per directive.
- Min bar (progress-critic trip-wire): **(a) sorry-free — MET.** iter-069 last-extension trip-wire DEFUSED.

## Targets

### (a) `presheafDualH1Cocycle` — SOLVED sorry-free, axiom-clean
The dual-flank H1 cocycle. Real content factored into a NEW **generic** mate-calculus lemma proven once + instantiated:
- **`CategoryTheory.Adjunction.leftAdjointUniq_leftAdjointCompIso_comm`** (L90) — two families of left adjoints `F•,P•` sharing right adjoints level-by-level + shared right-adjoint comp iso `e`; with `H1ₖ = leftAdjointUniq adjFₖ adjPₖ`:
  `FC.hom ≫ H1₀₂.hom = (H1₀₁.hom ▷ F₁₂) ≫ (P₀₁ ◁ H1₁₂.hom) ≫ PC.hom`.
  Proof: `(conjugateEquiv adjP02 (adjF01.comp adjF12)).injective`; both mates compute to `e.inv` via `← conjugateEquiv_comp` (SPLITS the composite — simp lemma only combines), `conjugateEquiv_whiskerLeft/Right`, + 2 new mate facts.
- **`conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointUniq_hom`** (L60) — mate of `leftAdjointUniq` is `𝟙 G`. By `rw [leftAdjointUniq, Iso.symm_hom, conjugateIsoEquiv_symm_apply_inv, Iso.refl_inv, Equiv.apply_symm_apply]`.
- **`conjugateEquiv_leftAdjointCompIso_hom`** (L71) — mate of `leftAdjointCompIso.hom` is `e.inv` (companion of Mathlib's `…_inv`).

(a) is then a one-line `exact` instantiation at the three `pushforwardPushforwardAdj`/`pullbackPushforwardAdjunction` pairs, reconciled by presheaf `pushforwardComp`. Dual-flank analogue of the project keystone `conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`.

**Idioms that worked / pitfalls:**
- `Functor.whiskerRight/Left` NOT bare `whiskerRight/Left` — `open MonoidalCategory` shadows them to monoidal whiskering ⇒ `MonoidalCategoryStruct (C₀ ⥤ C₁)` synth failure (cost one build cycle, L96 errors).
- Composite-immersion `αhf` needs EXPLICIT `naturality := fun _ _ i => (h ≫ f).appIso_inv_naturality i` — aesop default succeeds for single `f`/`h` but FAILS for `h ≫ f` (cost one build cycle, L636 aesop failure).

### c.2 `presheafDualPullbackComparison_restrict` (L672) — BLOCKED (reversal fired AGAIN, sharpened)
Attempt: invert (a), substitute into elementwise c.2 LHS, match RHS sliceDualTransport chain.
**Precise obstacle (genuine finding):** the c.2 RHS INTERLEAVES the `H1` factors with the `sliceDualTransport` factors. Leg-2 applies the OUTER functor `(pullback φR_h)` to the WHOLE `θ_f`, so its H1-part is `(pullback φR_h).map H1_f.inv`; the natural (a)-inverse groups it as `H1_f.inv ▷ pushforward β_h = (pushforward β_h).map H1_f.inv` — a DIFFERENT functor on the middle leg. Reconciling requires *sliding* the sDT factors past the H1's via the per-open crux `presheafDual_pullback_restrict_natural` — i.e. the dual mirror of the interleaved four-square merge (`hslide`+`comp_cancel_mid`) that makes the proven tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict` ~600 lines.
**Conclusion:** c.2 is NOT "(a) then standalone (b)". (a) closes independently; the sDT flank (b) is *entangled with the merge* and only becomes a well-posed statement after the slide. Prover did NOT grind (directive-compliant), did NOT add a speculative standalone (b).

### (b) `sliceDualTransport_comp` — NOT added (deliberate)
The "sDT-only" residual cannot be read off without first performing the slide; any standalone statement now would guess the post-slide reindexing isos and corrupt the 1-to-1 blueprint frontier. Re-spec (prover's, endorsed): fuse (b) into the c.2 merge — (b) = the SPECIFIC slide identity that the `presheafDual_pullback_restrict_natural` step needs, in the goal's exact spelling, NOT an abstract sDT composition law.

## Review-phase subagents
- **lean-auditor** (`iter070`): CLEAN, 0 critical, 3 major (all hygiene/non-blocking): L274 stale `"(as here)"` comment falsely implies `presheafDualPullbackComparison` is sorry'd; L670 `set_option backward.isDefEq.respectTransparency false` unexplained; L671 `maxHeartbeats 3200000` missing required style-linter comment. 4 new decls confirmed genuinely sorry-free + axiom-clean (`{propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}`), proofs non-vacuous. 3 sorries honest. `task_results/lean-auditor-iter070.md`.
- **lean-vs-blueprint-checker** (`presheafdualpullback-iter070`): Lean faithful & axiom-clean; 3 major blueprint-side: (1) **(a)'s displayed INVERSE equation (L7883–7888) is a faulty inversion** — f/h transposed in the two middle legs, `pullbackComp` needs `.inv` not `.hom`; Lean realizes the correct hom-form (a faithful strengthening). (2) the 3 new generic `Adjunction.*` lemmas have NO `\lean{}` block (coverage debt). (3) c.2 parent prose (L7998–8003) still implies (b) is a standalone factor law, contradicting the realized two-immersion interleaved merge. `task_results/lean-vs-blueprint-checker-presheafdualpullback-iter070.md`.

## Blueprint markers updated (manual)
- `Picard_TensorObjSubstrate.tex`, `lem:presheafdual_h1_cocycle`: added `% NOTE:` (~L7888) flagging the faulty displayed-inverse formula (lvb major #1) with the correct realized hom-form, for the writer to rewrite. No `\leanok` override needed — `sync_leanok` (iter 70, sha 04f142d, +2/-0) correctly marked (a) statement+proof; consistent with auditor (sorry-free).

## Blueprint doctor
- Clean: no orphans, no broken `\ref`/`\uses`, no axiom decls.

## Key findings
- **(a) landed via abstract generalisation, not grind** — the right move was to lift the cocycle to a generic 3-category mate-calculus lemma (reusable Mathlib-style supplement), then instantiate. Matches the keystone pattern (`conjugateEquiv_restrictFunctorComp_inv`).
- **The dual flank's reversal signal has now fired 4 consecutive iters (067/068/069/070).** Each iter sharpens the residual but c.2 keeps receding. iter-070 pinned it definitively: c.2 ≠ (a)+(b)-as-atoms; it is the **two-immersion interleaved merge**, the exact dual of the ~600-line tensor `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`. This is a GRIND, not a clean decomposition. See recommendations.

## Recommendations (next session)
See `recommendations.md`. Headline: re-spec c.2 as the interleaved merge (mirror `pullbackTensorMap_restrict`), NOT as standalone (b); fix the 3 lvb blueprint majors first; coverage-debt the 3 generic Adjunction lemmas.
